signals.headline: Wrapped XRP (WXRP) Live on Solana Since April 17, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Wrapped XRP (WXRP) Live on Solana Since April 17, 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Wrapped XRP is now fully operational on Solana, backed 1:1 by real XRP in regulated custody, enabling XRP holders to access Solana's DeFi ecosystem (yield farming, liquidity pools) without selling.[1]  
This bridge went live on April 17—recent relative to today—and expands XRP utility beyond payments into Solana's $
